description: This GitBook is the long-form guide for seLe4n — a production-oriented microkernel written in Lean 4 with machine-checked proofs, targeting Raspberry Pi 5.
current_state_bullets: **Codebase metrics:** ~115k production LoC across 175 files; ~21k test LoC across 30 suites (now includes `tests/SmpFoundationsSuite.lean` from WS-SM SM0.S — 50+ surface anchors + 41 runtime assertions); 3,352 theorem/lemma declarations (zero sorry/axiom).

**Latest audit:** [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_COMPREHENSIVE`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_COMPREHENSIVE.md) + [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_DEEP_VERIFICATION`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_DEEP_VERIFICATION.md) — pre-1.0 readiness audit. WS-RC R0..R5 LANDED at v0.31.2; R6..R14 absorbed into WS-SM per the SM0.Q.1 absorption mapping in [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_WORKSTREAM_PLAN.md §15`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_WORKSTREAM_PLAN.md). Sub-portfolio plans archived to [`docs/dev_history/audits/`](../dev_history/audits/) per WS-SM SM0.Q.2.

**Active workstream:** **WS-SM IN FLIGHT** (v0.31.2 → v0.31.3 → v0.32.x → v1.0.0). Unified workstream merging WS-RC's remaining R6..R14 phases with the SMP-specific SM-phases (SM0..SM9). **Phase SM0 (Foundations & honesty patches) COMPLETE** at v0.31.3 (branch `claude/complete-sm0-foundations-gldW8`): 21 sub-tasks across 6 categories (foundational types — CoreId/SharingDomain/SgiKind/LockKind/LockId/BklState; AN12-B inventory hardening — NoDup witnesses + build anchors closing SMP-H3, 6-way ArchAssumption machinery closing SMP-H2; Rust HAL scaffolding hardening — `.smp_stacks` zeroed, TPIDR_EL1 setup, MAX_SECONDARY_CORES pinned; documentation honesty patches — every `dev_history/` cross-reference removed from production sources, every "deferred to WS-V" SMP claim repointed, DEF-R-HAL-L20 disposition rewritten; testing infrastructure — SmpFoundationsSuite with 41 runtime assertions, tier-4 SMP boot-check stub; WS-RC merge — sub-portfolio plans archived). Plan: [`SMP_MULTICORE_COMPLETION_PLAN.md`](../planning/SMP_MULTICORE_COMPLETION_PLAN.md). SM0 sub-plan: [`SMP_FOUNDATIONS_PLAN.md`](../planning/SMP_FOUNDATIONS_PLAN.md). **Items deferred past v1.0.0 with correctness impact: NONE.** Next phases (planned): SM1 Rust HAL completion → SM2 verified locks → SM3 per-object locks → SM4 per-core state → SM5..SM9 closure cut at v1.0.0.
**Workstream history:** [`docs/WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md`](../WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md) — complete portfolio record and roadmap.
**Metrics source of truth:** [`docs/codebase_map.json`](../../docs/codebase_map.json) (`readme_sync` key). Cross-check with `./scripts/report_current_state.py`.
**Historical records:** Milestone closeouts and prior audits in [`docs/dev_history/`](../dev_history/README.md).
